response.step_by_step_log:
1. Observed title card 'JANE DOE' and '氷津あゆ' (Himizu Ayu) at 00:46.
2. Searched for '"JANE DOE" 氷津あゆ lyrics'.
3. Search results identified the song as 'JANE DOE' by Kenshi Yonezu & Hikaru Utada (Ending theme for 'Chainsaw Man – The Movie: Reze Arc').
4. Found original Japanese lyrics and English translations through a search for '"JANE DOE" Kenshi Yonezu Hikaru Utada Japanese and English lyrics'.
5. Structured the JSON, including the song metadata and extracted lyrics.
response.global_summary: A performance of the song 'JANE DOE' by two virtual performers, with intro and concluding dialogue intervals.

scenes.description: Intro sequence with virtual characters dancing on a stage set.
Virtual performers sing 'JANE DOE'. Title card appears.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
まるでこの世界で二人だけみたいだね
なんて少しだけ夢をみてしまっただけ
つま先に月明かり 花束の香り
指に触れる指
さよなら もう行かなきゃ
何もかも忘れて
硝子の上を裸足のまま歩く
痛むごとに 血が流れて 落ちていく
お願い その赤い足跡を
たどって 会いに来て
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's as if we were the only two left in this world–
I just couldn't resist dreaming for a bit
Moonlight on my tiptoes, the scent of a bouquet
Fingers touching fingers
Goodbye, I have to go now
Forget everything
I walk on glass, barefoot
With every step, blood flows and falls
Please, follow those red footprints
And come find me

scenes.description: Concluding dialogue between the two virtual performers.
